name: Eggnog
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup dark rum or brandy, optional
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the milk in a heavy saucepan until it is steaming.
2. Whisk together the eggs, egg whites, and sugar in a bowl.
3. Gradually whisk in the hot milk.
4. Return the mixture to the saucepan and cook over medium heat, stirring constantly with a wooden spoon. Cook for 4 to 6 minutes, or until the custard thickens enough to coat the spoon. Do not overcook or the custard will curdle.
5. Immediately remove from the heat and pour through a strainer into a bowl. Stir in the vanilla. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or until chilled.
6. Before serving, pour half of the custard into a blender. Add 2 ice cubes and half of the rum. Blend until frothy.
7. Pour into glasses and sprinkle nutmeg over top. Repeat with remaining custard and rum.
